[053:LSCR#0200]\255\010\101\175\255\010\064\008\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000Looks like something important's happening.
[053:LSCR#0200]\255\010\016\092\255\010\065\008\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000^hundreds of years ago, it was becoming apparent that our time was running out.\255\003Yet, we were slow to heed the warnings of impending doom.\255\003The seemingly slow encroachment of mankind, and all that his many living-styles entail,\255\003seemed like a vague and distant problem.\255\003A problem for future generations of Yeti to solve.
[053:LSCR#0200]\255\010\187\034\255\010\073\008\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000Blithely we sat back ignoring our own inner call for action.\255\003Tradition and the status quo were our excuses for complacency.
[053:LSCR#0200]\255\010\230\238\255\010\075\008\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000The certainty of not just losing our way of life but possibly our very lives,\255\003and the demise of our entire race is now becoming a reality!\255\003A reality we can no longer choose to ignore.
[053:LSCR#0200]\255\010\017\146\255\010\080\008\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000As it turns out, the humans and their technology are moving faster than we are.  Much faster than we had anticipated.
[053:LSCR#0200]\255\010\188\240\255\010\082\008\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000^and so, we now face the final crisis.\255\003Unless we pull together, not just acknowledging the need for change, but embracing change not just with our hearts and our minds,\255\003but with our actions, we will fall behind, moving backward into extinction!

[078:LSCR#0205]\255\010\004\006\255\010\061\004\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000That's the Enchanted Argyle Forest!
[078:LSCR#0205]\255\010\175\183\255\010\061\004\255\010\010\000\255\010\000\000It's the Inexplicable Valley of Lights!
